title: Trump 48-Hour Hormuz Ultimatum
market_impact: Escalation risk bullish for oil (CL) and gold (GC). SPY bearish on military action risk. Energy sector (XLE, USO) sensitive.
notes: Posted Mar 21 7:44 PM ET. Deadline Mar 23 7:44 PM ET. Threatened to obliterate Iranian power plants starting with largest. Postponed multiple times → superseded by Apr 6 deadline.

title: Trump Energy Strike Pause Deadline
market_impact: If deadline passes without deal: US strikes on Iran power grid resume. Bullish oil (CL) and gold (GC). Bearish SPY. Energy sector (XLE, USO, UNG) highly sensitive. Desalination plants at risk affects Gulf states.
notes: Truth Social Mar 26: 'I am pausing the period of Energy Plant destruction by 10 Days to Monday, April 6, 2026, at 8 PM Eastern Time.' 3rd postponement of original Mar 23 Hormuz ultimatum. Talks 'going very well' per Trump; Iran denies negotiations. 15-point US ceasefire proposal rejected by Tehran. IRGC naval chief Tangsiri killed by Israel Mar 26. G7 foreign ministers meeting in Paris to discuss Hormuz.
